title: Nightmare

pages.label: PAGE 0 — Voices in the dark (prelude)
pages.prompt: 1536x1024 pure black background floating white italic uppercase glowing text no bubble borders staggered layout nightmare voices prelude. EXACT text: I FEEL BAD FOR ETHAN. / YOU WANT HIM TO BE GOOD AT SCHOOL AND TAEKWONDO? / I DON'T THINK HE HAS THE TEMPERAMENT TO COMPETE AS A WORLD CLASS BLACK BELT. / YOU SKIPPED THESE TOURNAMENTS. / I DON'T KNOW HOW COMMITTED YOU ARE FOR TAEKWONDO. / YOU ARE EITHER WITH US... / ...OR AGAINST US. larger bottom center.
